children.label: A
children.text: each research program carried out by the Agricultural Research Service or the Economic Research Service for which annual appropriations are requested in the annual budget submission of the President; and

children.label: B
children.text: each competitive program carried out by the National Institute of Food and Agriculture for which annual appropriations are requested in the annual budget submission of the President.

children.heading: Request for applications
children.label: 2 Request for applications
children.text: The term “request for applications” means a funding announcement published by the National Institute of Food and Agriculture that provides detailed information on funding opportunities at the Institute, including the purpose, eligibility, restriction, focus areas, evaluation criteria, regulatory information, and instructions on how to apply for such opportunities.

children.heading: Budget request
children.label: b Budget request
children.text: The President shall submit to Congress, together with the annual budget submission of the President, a single budget line item reflecting the total amount requested by the President for funding for research, education, and extension activities of the Research, Education, and Economics mission area of the Department for that fiscal year and for the preceding 5 fiscal years.

children.heading: Capacity and infrastructure program request
children.label: c Capacity and infrastructure program request

children.text: 1890 Institutions;
1994 Institutions;
NLGCA Institutions;
Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities; and
small 1862 Institutions.
enhancing funding for emerging problems; and
finding solutions for those problems.

children.heading: Additional presidential budget submission requirement
children.label: e Additional presidential budget submission requirement
A
children.text: in the case of the information described in paragraph (2), such information together with the annual budget submission of the President; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of any additional information described in paragraph (3), such additional information within a reasonable period that begins after the date of the annual budget submission of the President.

children.label: i
children.text: the funding level for the program for the fiscal year preceding the year for which the annual budget submission of the President is submitted;

children.label: ii
children.text: the funding level requested in the annual budget submission of the President, including any increase or decrease in the funding level; and

children.label: iii
children.text: an explanation justifying any change from the funding level specified in clause (i) to the level specified in clause (ii);

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to each covered program that is carried out by the Economic Research Service or the Agricultural Research Service, the location and staff years of the program;

children.label: i
children.text: each grant and cooperative agreement awarded under subsection (d) of ;section 2279 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: each priority area specified in subsection (b)(2) of ;section 3157 of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: each research and extension project carried out under ;section 5811(a) of this title

children.label: iv
children.text: each grant awarded under ; andsection 5925b(a) of this title

children.label: v
children.text: each grant awarded under ; andsection 7632(d) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: any other information the Secretary determines will increase congressional oversight with respect to covered programs.

children.heading: Additional information described
children.label: 3 Additional information described
children.text: The additional information described in this paragraph is information that the Secretary, after consulting with the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate, and the Subcommittees on Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies of the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives and the Senate, determines is a necessary revision or clarification to the information described in paragraph (2).

children.label: f Report of the Secretary of Agriculture

children.text: are duplicative or overlap within the Department of Agriculture; or

children.text: other Federal agencies;

children.text: the States (including the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico and other territories or possessions of the United States);

children.text: the private sector; and

for each report submitted under this section on or after , a 5-year projection of national priorities with respect to agricultural research, extension, and education, taking into account domestic needs.January 1, 2014

children.heading: Interchangeability of funds
children.label: g Interchangeability of funds
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed so as to limit the authority of the Secretary under , with respect to the reprogramming or transfer of funds.section 2257 of this title
